# Avatar Component Documentation

A circular or square user image with automatic initials fallback and optional presence status indicator.

## Component API

### Props

- `src?: string` — Image source URL
- `alt?: string` — Alt text for the image (defaults to `name` if not set)
- `initials?: string` — Explicit initials to display (overrides name-derived initials)
- `name?: string` — Full name used to auto-derive initials (first + last initial)
- `size?: 'xs' | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl'` — Size variant (default: `'md'`)
- `status?: 'online' | 'offline' | 'away' | 'busy'` — Presence indicator dot
- `shape?: 'circle' | 'square'` — Shape variant (default: `'circle'`)
- `class?: string` — Additional CSS classes on the root element

## Initials Derivation

When `initials` is not provided:
- Single-word name (e.g., `"Alice"`) → `"A"`
- Multi-word name (e.g., `"Alice Brown"`) → `"AB"` (first + last word initials)
- No name → `"?"`

When `src` is set but the image fails to load (`onerror`), the component falls back to initials automatically.

## DOM Structure

### With image

```html
<div data-avatar data-size="md" data-shape="circle" role="img" aria-label="Alice Brown">
  <img src="/alice.jpg" alt="Alice Brown" data-avatar-img />
</div>
```

### Initials fallback

```html
<div data-avatar data-size="md" data-shape="circle" role="img" aria-label="Alice Brown">
  <span data-avatar-initials aria-hidden="true">AB</span>
</div>
```

### With status dot

```html
<div data-avatar data-size="md" data-shape="circle" data-status="online" role="img" aria-label="Alice Brown">
  <span data-avatar-initials aria-hidden="true">AB</span>
  <span data-avatar-status data-status="online" aria-label="online"></span>
</div>
```

## Usage Examples

### Basic

```svelte
<script>
  import { Avatar } from '@rokkit/ui'
</script>

<!-- Auto-derived initials -->
<Avatar name="Alice Brown" />

<!-- Explicit initials -->
<Avatar initials="JD" />

<!-- With image -->
<Avatar src="/avatar.jpg" name="Bob Smith" />
```

### With Status

```svelte
<Avatar name="Online User" status="online" />
<Avatar name="Away User" status="away" />
<Avatar name="Busy User" status="busy" />
<Avatar name="Offline User" status="offline" />
```

### Sizes and Shapes

```svelte
<Avatar name="Small Circle" size="sm" />
<Avatar name="Large Square" size="lg" shape="square" />
```

## Size Scale

| Value | Dimensions |
|-------|-----------|
| xs    | 1.5rem    |
| sm    | 2rem      |
| md    | 2.5rem    |
| lg    | 3rem      |
| xl    | 4rem      |

## Styling Hooks

- `[data-avatar]` — Root element
- `[data-avatar][data-size='md']` etc. — Size variants
- `[data-avatar][data-shape='circle']` — Circle shape (border-radius: 9999px)
- `[data-avatar][data-shape='square']` — Square shape (border-radius: 0.375rem)
- `[data-avatar][data-status='online']` etc. — Presence state on root
- `[data-avatar-img]` — The `<img>` element
- `[data-avatar-initials]` — The initials `<span>`
- `[data-avatar-status]` — The status dot `<span>` (positioned absolute, bottom-right)
- `[data-avatar-status][data-status='online']` — Status dot color variant
